title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Domino's India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Domino's India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Domino's India International Enterprises in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Domino's India International Enterprises:
Domino's India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Domino's India International Enterprises!
